reviews.author: Aniketh Alladi
reviews.review_body: Johnson Grammar School is one of the best school to study.The school also supports extracurricular activities and helps students in having a good future

reviews.author: chaitanya chunduru
reviews.review_body: Johson Grammar School excels in providing excellent education and good in extra curricular activites with great exposure in practical knowledge

reviews.author: BIBEKJYOTH KAUR SALUJA
reviews.review_body: Not to elaborate much but the best years of my life I have spent here. The school has always supported me and has helped me out to be a shark in this big ocean. I will always be grateful towards the faculty to help me bring forth and excel in my talent

reviews.author: Mariya Stephy
reviews.review_body: Being a teacher, I find JGS an exceptional educational institution. State of the art facilities and support services demonstrate a commitment to student success. The staff here are amicable and dedicated. JGS has laid a strong foundation for students ' endeavours for sure. The right choice ♥️

reviews.author: ravi pushpala
reviews.review_body: Johnson Grammar School CBSE, Nacharam strives for excellence by moulding students to become lifelong learners .It  facilitates 'personalized learning' tailored to the distinctive learning style of each child.  It's innovative pedagogy in a serene environment makes it a  proper progressive education . I am a proud parent of JGS.

reviews.author: Arakala Mamatha
reviews.review_body: It is been over 2 years that we have been associated with JGS CBSE Nacharam. It's been rather a very pleasant experience. Overall  the pedagogy and the way they interact with students is excellent. We thank the teachers and management for the extraordinary support. The feeling of our loved one being  in safe  hands is really priceless

reviews.author: Sanjoy Saha
reviews.review_body: Johnson Grammar School CBSE Nacharam is one of the best schools in this locality. As a parent we are fortunate to be a part of this school. It gives an ample opportunity for overall development of a child. Teachers are skilled and have a great subject knowledge which helps a holistic growth of a child.

reviews.author: yamarthi vijaya
reviews.review_body: Choosing Johnson Grammar School for my child was the right decision. The school's engaging classes, experienced teachers, and emphasis on active participation enhance communication skills. School have a transparent fee structure. It has a responsive, parent and student-friendly management that listens to parent concerns and responds positively in no time with conducive solutions make quality education accessible. The school excels in overall development, instilling 21st-century skills, promoting sports,  which nurtures emotional, social, and physical well-being. Additionally, it ensures a healthy environment, making it an excellent choice for holistic development, distinguishing it as an excellent choice for parents seeking holistic development for their children.

reviews.author: Malathi Kasula
reviews.review_body: JGS is an amazing  and marvelous school.It gives an  ample of opportunities to explore the students in all the aspects. Iam impressed with the understanding and learning skills provided to students. Concepts are taught using activities which makes the learning ease for students. Iam also pleased with the management and teachers for their supportive nature in solving the queries.
